message:
docs(phase2c): add FT-P2C-006 e2e forensics logs, crash triage, and failure index

Add end-to-end forensics artifacts for the serialization packet
(FT-P2C-006):

- ft-p2c-006.jsonl: structured e2e log with 4 entries covering both
  strict and hardened modes for the checkpoint_basic and
  checkpoint_sparse_grad scenarios. All entries pass with reason_code
  "serialization_parity_ok". Each log line includes suite_id,
  scenario_id, fixture_id, packet_id, mode, seed, env_fingerprint,
  artifact_refs, replay_command, and outcome fields.

- crash_triage_ft_p2c_006_v1.json: crash/panic triage report for
  the FT-P2C-006 e2e run. Reports 0 triage incidents, confirming
  no crashes or panics during serialization conformance execution.

- failure_forensics_index_ft_p2c_006_v1.json: failure forensics
  index linking each scenario to its replay command, log position,
  and artifact references. All scenarios indexed with pass status
  and no failure entries requiring investigation.

These artifacts complete the e2e validation step (bd-3v0.17.7) for
the FT-P2C-006 packet lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
